entry.title: BEE IT Reconstruction Hair Mask 1000ml
entry.summary:
Vendor: BEE IT
Type: Conditioner
Price: 46.50

A concentrated repairing post shampoo mask which gratifies for its immediate effectiveness. Gives strength and elasticity, deeply hydrating and nourishing for a healthy, luminous and plumped up hair.

How to use: Apply after shampooing to towel-dried hair. Leave on for 5-10 minutes, then comb and rinse. 

Ingredients: Aqua, Behenamidopropyl dimethylamine, Cetearyl alcohol, Lactic acid, Phenoxyethanol, Parfum, Guar hydroxypropyltrimonium chloride, Tocopheryl acetate, Sorbitol, Ethylhexylglycerin, Tetrasodium glutamate diacetate, Olea europaea fruit oil*, Opuntia ficus-indica seed oil, Glycerin, Myrtus communis extract, Panthenol, Hamamelis virginiana leaf extract*, Mel*, Propolis, Retinyl palmitate, Limonene, Linalool, Sodium benzoate, Potassium sorbate.

*Organic

100% Natural Ingredients

Animal Friendly | No Paraffin | No Silicones | No Parabens | 100% Recyclable

By purchasing BEE IT cosmetics  you contribute to the creation of new bee oasis. 

Made in Italy

entry.title: BEE IT Reconstruction Hair Mask 50ml
entry.summary:
Vendor: BEE IT
Type: Shampoo
Price: 4.90

A concentrated repairing post shampoo mask which gratifies for its immediate effectiveness. Gives strength and elasticity, deeply hydrating and nourishing for a healthy, luminous and plumped up hair.

How to use: Apply after shampooing to towel-dried hair. Leave on for 5-10 minutes, then comb and rinse. 

Ingredients: Aqua, Behenamidopropyl dimethylamine, Cetearyl alcohol, Lactic acid, Phenoxyethanol, Parfum, Guar hydroxypropyltrimonium chloride, Tocopheryl acetate, Sorbitol, Ethylhexylglycerin, Tetrasodium glutamate diacetate, Olea europaea fruit oil*, Opuntia ficus-indica seed oil, Glycerin, Myrtus communis extract, Panthenol, Hamamelis virginiana leaf extract*, Mel*, Propolis, Retinyl palmitate, Limonene, Linalool, Sodium benzoate, Potassium sorbate.

*Organic

100% Natural Ingredients

Animal Friendly | No Paraffin | No Silicones | No Parabens | 100% Recyclable

“Less plastic is fantastic” packaging is using 70% less plastic compared to a normal bottle pack. Less bulk, being soft and doesn’t break, generates a better recycling chain and allows use of all its contents.

By purchasing BEE IT cosmetics  you contribute to the creation of new bee oasis. 

Made in Italy

entry.title: Magrada Moisturizing Hair Mask with Rhubarb Extract Refill 500ml
entry.summary:
Vendor: Magrada Organic Cosmetics
Type: Conditioner
Price: 30.50

Voluminous, shiny, healthy – we have created a professional hair care collection for you to enjoy beautiful salon hair every day.

The gold medal-winning (Pure Beauty Global Awards 2021 Winner) hair mask is designed for intensive nurturing and moisturising of dry and damaged hair.

The rhubarb hair mask with castor oil and macadamia oil pampers, revives, and smooths damaged hair. The vitality of the plants has a balancing and nurturing effect. The natural care improves the hair structure and reduces damage, adding a captivating shine to the hair.

The silky, creamy composition will give the hair a spring-like freshness and the juicy aroma of rhubarb.

  • Thanks to its anti-inflammatory and anti-bacterial properties, rhubarb root extract soothes a sensitive and irritated scalp.
  • Macadamia oil is rich in fatty acids and potassium, which will make your hair stronger and easier to comb. Macadamia oil contains antioxidants which help the hair to recover from damaging environmental impacts.
  • Castor oil has an anti-microbial effect, which helps to reduce dandruff and other scalp issues deteriorating hair health. The vitamin E in the oil moisturises hair roots and gives the hair a healthy shine.

How to use: Apply the mask on damp hair after shampooing, starting from the tips. Leave in for 5–15 minutes, then rinse with plenty of water.

Store at a temperature of 5 to 25 degrees. When storing, protect from direct sunlight. Do not store the product near heaters or other heat sources.

Ingredients: Aqua, Cetearyl Alcohol, Cetrimonium Chloride, Behentrimonium Methosulfate, Macadamia Ternifolia (Macadamia) Seed Oil, Ricinus Communis (Castor) Seed Oil, Cetyl Alcohol, Hydrolyzed Wheat Protein, Hydrolyzed Wheat Starch, Parfum, Butylene Glycol, Rheum Palmatum (Rhubarb) Root Extract, Triethanolamine, Phenoxyethanol, Ethylhexylglycerin

Ingredients of natural origin: 94,16%.

The list of ingredients may be changed. Please see the packaging for the updated and most accurate list of ingredients.

paraben-free | sulphate-free | silicone-free | vegan | alcohol-free | EU allergen-free | cruelty-free | hand-made | with a minimal list of ingredients

entry.title: Magrada Moisturizing Hair Mask with Rhubarb Extract Travel Size 100ml
entry.summary:
Vendor: Magrada Organic Cosmetics
Type: Conditioner
Price: 10.90

Voluminous, shiny, healthy – we have created a professional hair care collection for you to enjoy beautiful salon hair every day.

The gold medal-winning (Pure Beauty Global Awards 2021 Winner) hair mask is designed for intensive nurturing and moisturising of dry and damaged hair.

The rhubarb hair mask with castor oil and macadamia oil pampers, revives, and smooths damaged hair. The vitality of the plants has a balancing and nurturing effect. The natural care improves the hair structure and reduces damage, adding a captivating shine to the hair.

The silky, creamy composition will give the hair a spring-like freshness and the juicy aroma of rhubarb.

  • Thanks to its anti-inflammatory and anti-bacterial properties, rhubarb root extract soothes a sensitive and irritated scalp.
  • Macadamia oil is rich in fatty acids and potassium, which will make your hair stronger and easier to comb. Macadamia oil contains antioxidants which help the hair to recover from damaging environmental impacts.
  • Castor oil has an anti-microbial effect, which helps to reduce dandruff and other scalp issues deteriorating hair health. The vitamin E in the oil moisturises hair roots and gives the hair a healthy shine.

How to use: Apply the mask on damp hair after shampooing, starting from the tips. Leave in for 5–15 minutes, then rinse with plenty of water.

Store at a temperature of 5 to 25 degrees. When storing, protect from direct sunlight. Do not store the product near heaters or other heat sources.

Ingredients: Aqua, Cetearyl Alcohol, Cetrimonium Chloride, Behentrimonium Methosulfate, Macadamia Ternifolia (Macadamia) Seed Oil, Ricinus Communis (Castor) Seed Oil, Cetyl Alcohol, Hydrolyzed Wheat Protein, Hydrolyzed Wheat Starch, Parfum, Butylene Glycol, Rheum Palmatum (Rhubarb) Root Extract, Triethanolamine, Phenoxyethanol, Ethylhexylglycerin

Ingredients of natural origin: 94,16%.

The list of ingredients may be changed. Please see the packaging for the updated and most accurate list of ingredients.

paraben-free | sulphate-free | silicone-free | vegan | alcohol-free | EU allergen-free | cruelty-free | hand-made | with a minimal list of ingredients

entry.title: MÁDARA FEED Repair & Dry Rescue hair mask 180ml
entry.summary:
Vendor: MADARA
Type: Hair Mask
Price: 23.90

Deeply nourish your hair with this exceptional oil blend and fungi-based restructure mask that also prevents fiber damage , preserves colour and softens the hair.  Strengthens the lipid matrix and improves protection against mechanical damage and heat appliance to ensure silky smooth high-shine hair for days.

How to use: ​​​​Apply to clean, damp hair lengths and ends. Leave in for 5–10 minutes and rinse out thoroughly.

Ingredients: Cantharellus cibarius (chanterelle) extract, Cetearyl Alcohol, Distearoylethyl Dimonium Chloride, Glycerin, Brassica Alcohol, PCA Glyceryl Oleate, Sodium PCA, Brassicyl Isoleucinate Esylate, Lactic Acid, Aroma, Cocos Nucifera (Coconut) Oil, Xylitylglucoside, Butylene Glycol, Guar Hydroxypropyltrimonium Chloride, Benzyl Alcohol, Anhydroxylitol, Persea Gratissima (Avocado) Oil, Hydrolyzed Wheat Protein, Sodium Benzoate, Xylitol, Hydrolyzed Keratin, Potassium Sorbate, Ascorbyl Palmitate, Butyrospermum Parkii (Shea) Butter, Oenothera Biennis (Evening Primrose) Oil, Prunus Amygdalus Dulcis (Sweet Almond) Oil, Tocopherol, Crambe Maritima (Sea Kale) Leaf Extract, Leuconostoc/Radish Root Ferment Filtrate, Linalool, Limonene, Citrus Aurantium Peel Oil, Juniperus Virginiana Oil, Benzyl Salicylate

COSMOS ORGANIC certified

Please note that ingredient lists may change and slightly vary from time to time. You will always find the most up-to-date information on the actual product packaging.

entry.title: HOIA Hydrating Hair Mist 100ml
entry.summary:
Vendor: HOIA
Type: Conditioner
Price: 23.90

Pleasantly scented hydrating spray helps to keep hair healthy, strong and shiny. Spray contains locally sourced nettle extract and rice water to strengthen hair, plant-based keratin, deeply moisturizing hyaluronic acid and aloe, hair-softening seaweed extracts and plant hydrosols, nourishing oils and shine-enhancing essential oils.

How to use: Shake the bottle before use and spray an appropriate amount onto wet or dry hair. No need to rinse hair.

Ingredients: *Salvia Officinalis Distillate water, *Achillea Millefolium Distillate water, Oryza Sativa Seed water, Chodrus Crispus extract, Sargassum Fluitans/Natans extract, Hydrolyzed Wheat Protein, Crambe Abyssinica Seed oil, *Nigella Sativa Seed oil, Saccharomyces Ferment, Lactobacillus Ferment, Hydronated Sodium Hyaluronate, Glycerin, Aloe Barbadensis Leaf juice, Sodium Levulinate, Urtica Dioica Plant extract, Pentylene Glycol, Sodium Anisate, *Lavandula Angustifolia oil, *Pelargonium Graveolens oil, Citric Acid. **Citral, **Geraniol, **Linalool, **Limonene, **Citronellol.

*Organic. **Natural components of essential oil

Handmade in Saaremaa

entry.title: Magrada Moisturizing Hair Mask with Rhubarb Extract 250ml
entry.summary:
Vendor: Magrada Organic Cosmetics
Type: Conditioner
Price: 15.90

Voluminous, shiny, healthy – we have created a professional hair care collection for you to enjoy beautiful salon hair every day.

The gold medal-winning (Pure Beauty Global Awards 2021 Winner) hair mask is designed for intensive nurturing and moisturising of dry and damaged hair.

The rhubarb hair mask with castor oil and macadamia oil pampers, revives, and smooths damaged hair. The vitality of the plants has a balancing and nurturing effect. The natural care improves the hair structure and reduces damage, adding a captivating shine to the hair.

The silky, creamy composition will give the hair a spring-like freshness and the juicy aroma of rhubarb.

  • Thanks to its anti-inflammatory and anti-bacterial properties, rhubarb root extract soothes a sensitive and irritated scalp.
  • Macadamia oil is rich in fatty acids and potassium, which will make your hair stronger and easier to comb. Macadamia oil contains antioxidants which help the hair to recover from damaging environmental impacts.
  • Castor oil has an anti-microbial effect, which helps to reduce dandruff and other scalp issues deteriorating hair health. The vitamin E in the oil moisturises hair roots and gives the hair a healthy shine.

How to use: Apply the mask on damp hair after shampooing, starting from the tips. Leave in for 5–15 minutes, then rinse with plenty of water.

Store at a temperature of 5 to 25 degrees. When storing, protect from direct sunlight. Do not store the product near heaters or other heat sources.

Ingredients: Aqua, Cetearyl Alcohol, Cetrimonium Chloride, Behentrimonium Methosulfate, Macadamia Ternifolia (Macadamia) Seed Oil, Ricinus Communis (Castor) Seed Oil, Cetyl Alcohol, Hydrolyzed Wheat Protein, Hydrolyzed Wheat Starch, Parfum, Butylene Glycol, Rheum Palmatum (Rhubarb) Root Extract, Triethanolamine, Phenoxyethanol, Ethylhexylglycerin

Ingredients of natural origin: 94,16%.

The list of ingredients may be changed. Please see the packaging for the updated and most accurate list of ingredients.

paraben-free | sulphate-free | silicone-free | vegan | alcohol-free | EU allergen-free | cruelty-free | hand-made | with a minimal list of ingredients

entry.title: NAIF Easy Styling Hair Lotion for Baby & Kids 150ml
entry.summary:
Vendor: NAIF
Type: Conditioner
Price: 14.90

A hair lotion to tame and take care of wild kids hair. Naïf's Easy Styling Hair Lotion makes combing easier and reduces tangles and frizz for all hair types. 

  • Hair lotion with natural ingredients that doesn't make the hair greasy
  • Softens knots and tangles in the hair and reduces frizz in curls
  • Can also be used with cradle cap
  • For use on babies and children, for all hairtypes
  • Does not contain microplastics, mineral oils, SLES or silicones

How to use: Spray on towel-dried hair from 30 cm away. Massage gently, comb through the hair and style. Suitable for daily use.

Ingredients: Aqua/Water, Methylpropanediol, Caprylyl/Capryl Glucoside, Glycerin, Gossypium Hirsutum (Cotton Seed) Extract, Caprylyl Glycol, Phenylpropanol, Inulin, Betaine, Sodium Cocoyl Glutamate, Glyceryl Caprylate, Polyglyceryl-6 Oleate, Sodium Surfactin, Parfum/Fragrance (allergen-free), Lactic Acid, Citric Acid, Sodium Hydroxide

Bottle made from recycled plastic

Price: 14.50

100% Natural Ingredients
